## Description

Brief description of the change (e.g. fix typo in BSA skill, add case study to reentrancy references).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New reference or content in existing skill
- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] Documentation / README / CONTRIBUTING
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Plugin / file(s) affected

- e.g. `plugins/proxy-upgrade-safety/`, `README.md`

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are limited to the intended scope (one skill/plugin or one doc).
- [ ] New or updated content is consistent with existing style and the [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] I have read the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and agree to uphold it.

## Related issues (optional)

Fixes #(issue number)
